name: property managers managing 5–15 rental units tool
description: For property managers managing 5–15 rental units, inconsistent reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automatically generate monthly property management reports instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent and delayed reporting to landlords

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistent and delayed reporting to landlords
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers managing 5–15 rental units, inconsistent reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automatically generate monthly property management reports instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
